title: Tcheam
description: A modpack specifically designed for the Tcheam discord, but anyone is free to download. Install and update the modpack with a single click!
body:
# Custom Modpack for the Tcheam discord.

Features optimization, quality of life, and some game changing mods for an entry in the modded space.

## Performance

Heavily based on the famous Fabulously Optimized modpack, Tcheam focuses on performance first. Using many well-established mods, you can expect much better performance than vanilla Minecraft.

## Tweaks

Through powerful quality of life mods, such as Mousetweaks and AppleSkin, Minecraft keeps its identity while gaining capabilities vanilla players can only wish for. Enjoy Distant Horizons for mind-boggling render distance at little additional cost!

Other mods like Create and Chipped are included to add decoration but also functionnality. Staying close to vanilla is a chosen objective of this modpack, so create is not necessary for advancing and its balancing is made to fit vanilla playthroughs.

## Future-proof

Running on 1.20.1 and fabric, Tcheam is a modern modpack that is based on modern frameworks and recent minecraft versions.

Older versions were developped for 1.21.8 and 1.21.1. These are not up to date and will not be updated. These versions are still listed for completeness but are not recommended.

## Additional considerations

To run this modpack, it is recommended to allocate at least 8GB of RAM, this is lessened if you choose to disable Distant Horizons. Edit: Jesus, I don't know if 8 is enough, try 16 at least.

## For your own Server

For some reason, as of 0.3.0, BetterStats has a tendency to invalidate player data. The mod can remain client side, but should be removed on the server. Dynmap is disabled by default. To make the modpack easy to install, it is the server owner's responsibility to enable it.
